---
title: "StatPan"
subtitle: "Clean, structured data for research & insights"
---

::: {#hero-banner .hero}
## Clean, structured data for research & insights

StatPan builds tools that turn raw, unstructured information into
actionable knowledge for researchers, analysts, and developers.
:::

::: {.services}
::: {.service-card}
### Leginote

Knowledge management platform for structured note-taking and research workflows.

[Learn more](docs/leginote/index.qmd){.btn}
:::

::: {.service-card}
### AssemblyMCP

Model Context Protocol server for assembling and orchestrating AI agent pipelines.

[Learn more](docs/assemblymcp/index.qmd){.btn}
:::

::: {.service-card}
### ragpan

Retrieval-Augmented Generation toolkit for building accurate, grounded AI applications.

[Learn more](docs/ragpan/index.qmd){.btn}
:::
:::

::: {.cta}
[Explore Services](docs/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
